description_long: This object is a highly stylized potted plant shaped like a human skull, with the entire surface covered in dense, overlapping green leaves. The leaves are textured and painted in various shades of green, giving the appearance of lush foliage growing over and forming the contours of the skull. The eye sockets, nose cavity, and mouth are hollow, with the mouth area showing detailed, realistic teeth. The back and sides of the object are completely covered in leafy textures, obscuring any traditional pot structure. The overall form is rounded and organic, with the leafy surface blending seamlessly into the skull features. The object has a natural, earthy appearance, suggesting a blend of plant life and human form, making it a striking decorative piece for urban environments.
description: A skull-shaped potted plant covered in dense, textured green leaves, with realistic facial features and hollow eye sockets. The leafy surface gives it a natural, organic look, blending plant and human forms.
description_view_0: Side view showing the leafy texture wrapping around the skull's profile, with the jaw and cheekbone contours visible beneath the foliage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the hollow eye sockets, nose cavity, and detailed teeth, all surrounded by dense green leaves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the leafy surface covering the skull's side and jawline.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded, fully leaf-covered back of the skull, with no facial features visible.
attribute_pot_decoration: skull-shaped, fully covered in leaf texture
